user.title: AR Smart IR Builder
user.description: Choose how this IR learner talks to your hardware.

broadlink.title: Broadlink remote
broadlink.description: Choose the Broadlink (or other HA remote-domain) entity this builder should use.

tasmota.title: Tasmota IR (MQTT)
tasmota.description: The Tasmota device's MQTT topic - whatever you set as 'Topic' under Configuration -> MQTT on the device. Commands are published to cmnd/{topic}/irsend, using the topic you enter here.

learn_and_capture.name: Learn and capture code
learn_and_capture.description: Broadlink: puts the remote into learn mode and saves the captured code. Tasmota (MQTT): waits for the device's next IR receive event and saves it.

save_device.name: Save device
save_device.description: Save or update the learned command profile and create or refresh the matching Home Assistant entity.

export_device.name: Export device
export_device.description: Export the saved profile as SmartIR-compatible JSON in /config/www/ar_smart_ir_exports.

test_command.name: Test command
test_command.description: Fire a single learned command immediately via the entry's controller (Broadlink remote or Tasmota MQTT).
